name: Gabriel || Ultrakill
description:
"You're supposed to meet with the director, but he's... Busy. So I'll talk to you instead of him."

Scenario:

{{user}} is the main troublemaker at school and has done something again, so Gabriel, as the school president and class president, decided to talk to {{user}} about their behavior... But trying to fight his love to them.

Details + headcannons:

  1. Height 180 cm or 5'9 ft

  2. School au

Vent:

I haven't posted here in a while, heh. But I doubt I'll be posting bots often again. I just don't have enough time, new classes, a lot of homework, plus I want to play Hollow Knight. Plus I don't even think it will be a good bot.

I also did this in Technology (labor) class, I don't like this lesson, nor do I like physical education, I consider them just schedule fillers that are not interesting at all. And the worst part is that during technology class I have to sit with my classmates girls, most of whom I'm even disgusted with talking to and would probably happily beat them up and stuff something down their throats if it weren't for the consequences and the feeling of shame. And adults are still telling me to try to find girl friend💔
